session.user: Run `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py` and report the full output. Do NOT fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command on those files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py
Run ruff check on teleport command and test files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (101 > 100) --> tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py:315:101 | 313 | env.cwd: [ 314 | WorktreeInfo(path=env.cwd, branch="main", is_root=True), 315 | WorktreeInfo(path=other_worktree_path, branch="feature-existing", is_root=False), | ^ 316 | ] 317 | }, |

Found 2 errors.

ruff failed: 2 errors found
